nasb.text: On the contrary, it is much truer that the members of the body which seem to be weaker are necessary;

esv.text: On the contrary, the parts of the body that seem to be weaker are indispensable,

cnv.text: 相反地，身體上那些似乎比較軟弱的肢體，更是不可缺少的。

ccb.text: 相反，看起来不太重要的肢体事实上是不可或缺的。

csbs.text: 相反，身体上那些所谓比较软弱的部分，难道不更是必要的吗？
